changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: chat_thread surface discriminant: WEB (default, backfills existing rows) | SLACK_DM.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE chat_thread ADD CONSTRAINT chk_chat_thread_surface CHECK (surface IN ('WEB', 'SLACK_DM'));

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE chat_thread DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_chat_thread_surface;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Typed link from a CONVERSATION_TURN placement to the mentor assistant chat_message that delivered it (SET NULL if the message is deleted; the feedback row survives for the temporal record).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_suppression_reason'

changeSet.comment: Add CONVERSATION_EXPIRED: a PREPARED conversation feedback that was never raised in a mentor turn and aged out.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE feedback DROP CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_suppression_reason; ALTER TABLE feedback ADD CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_suppression_reason CHECK (suppression_reason IS NULL OR suppression_reason IN ('REVIEWER_SIDE', 'BELOW_THRESHOLD', 'LOW_CONFIDENCE', 'POLICY_FLOOR_DROP', 'REACTED_DISPUTED', 'REACTED_NOT_APPLICABLE', 'CONVERSATION_EXPIRED'));

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE feedback DROP CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_suppression_reason; ALTER TABLE feedback ADD CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_suppression_reason CHECK (suppression_reason IS NULL OR suppression_reason IN ('REVIEWER_SIDE', 'BELOW_THRESHOLD', 'LOW_CONFIDENCE', 'POLICY_FLOOR_DROP', 'REACTED_DISPUTED', 'REACTED_NOT_APPLICABLE'));

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Rename git_provider → identity_provider (+ its PK and unique-constraint names). SCM entity FKs reference the table by OID and follow the rename without change.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE identity_provider RENAME CONSTRAINT pk_git_provider TO pk_identity_provider; ALTER TABLE identity_provider RENAME CONSTRAINT uq_git_provider_type_server_url TO uq_identity_provider_type_server_url;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE identity_provider RENAME CONSTRAINT uq_identity_provider_type_server_url TO uq_git_provider_type_server_url; ALTER TABLE identity_provider RENAME CONSTRAINT pk_identity_provider TO pk_git_provider;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM identity_provider WHERE type = 'SLACK' AND server_url = 'https://slack.com'

changeSet.comment: Seed the SLACK identity provider so Slack federated-login / DM identity keys onto a real provider row.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO identity_provider (type, server_url) VALUES ('SLACK', 'https://slack.com') ON CONFLICT (type, server_url) DO NOTHING;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM identity_provider WHERE type = 'SLACK' AND server_url = 'https://slack.com';

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Rename identity_link.git_provider_id → provider_id and its FK to identity_provider. The unique indexes uq_identity_link_provider_subject_team / uq_identity_link_active_per_provider reference the column and follow the RENAME automatically.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE identity_link RENAME CONSTRAINT sfk_identity_link_git_provider TO sfk_identity_link_provider;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE identity_link RENAME CONSTRAINT sfk_identity_link_provider TO sfk_identity_link_git_provider;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Maps a Slack DM to the mentor chat_thread it drives (P2). chat_thread_id is a scalar cross-module reference with a DB-level FK — no JPA association crosses the module boundary.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE mentor_slack_thread ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, workspace_id BIGINT NOT NULL, chat_thread_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES chat_thread(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, slack_team_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_channel_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_thread_ts VARCHAR(32), slack_user_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT uk_mentor_slack_thread UNIQUE (workspace_id, slack_channel_id) );

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Allow-listed + consent-gated Slack channel the workspace monitors (P3). Folds the per-channel backfill job into a state column instead of a separate slack_channel_backfill_job table.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE slack_monitored_channel ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, workspace_id BIGINT NOT NULL, slack_team_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_channel_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, channel_name VARCHAR(256), consent_state VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', consent_announced_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, backfill_state VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NONE', created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT uk_slack_monitored_channel UNIQUE (workspace_id, slack_channel_id), CONSTRAINT chk_slack_monitored_channel_consent CHECK (consent_state IN ('PENDING', 'ANNOUNCED', 'ACTIVE', 'PAUSED', 'REVOKED')), CONSTRAINT chk_slack_monitored_channel_backfill CHECK (backfill_state IN ('NONE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETE', 'FAILED')) );

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: A Slack thread aggregate (root message + replies) keyed by its thread_ts (P3 content surface).
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE slack_thread ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, workspace_id BIGINT NOT NULL, slack_channel_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_thread_ts VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, first_ts VARCHAR(32), last_ts VARCHAR(32), message_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT uk_slack_thread UNIQUE (workspace_id, slack_channel_id, slack_thread_ts) );

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Ingested Slack message (rendered text only; data minimization) — the P3 content surface. edited_at/deleted_at carry Slack message_changed/message_deleted tombstones (GDPR Art. 17); idx_slack_message_ingest drives the bounded-retention sweep.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE slack_message ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, workspace_id BIGINT NOT NULL, slack_team_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_channel_id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_ts VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, slack_thread_ts VARCHAR(32), author_slack_user_id VARCHAR(32), author_display_name VARCHAR(256), text TEXT, edited_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, ingested_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT uk_slack_message UNIQUE (workspace_id, slack_channel_id, slack_ts) ); CREATE INDEX idx_slack_message_ingest ON slack_message (workspace_id, ingested_at);

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Firewall stamp: resolved workspace User id of the message author (nullable; backfilled on link). Raw-JDBC only.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Resolved participant member ids for the mentor-context participant firewall; bigint[] + GIN for array-membership lookups.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE slack_thread ADD COLUMN participant_member_ids BIGINT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'; CREATE INDEX idx_slack_thread_participants ON slack_thread USING GIN (participant_member_ids);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_slack_thread_participants; ALTER TABLE slack_thread DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS participant_member_ids;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-slack
changeSet.comment: Conversation-detection watermark: the Slack ts through which this thread was last analysed.
